title: Collaboration Meeting Held Between Doğuş University and TEKNOFEST
content:
Student

News

Details

Date: 06 February 2026

Collaboration Meeting Held Between Doğuş University and TEKNOFEST

Representing Doğuş University, a delegation comprising Vice Rector Prof. Dr. Erkut ALTINDAĞ, Director of the Vocational School Assoc. Prof. Dr. Semra BOĞA ŞAHİN, Head of the Internet and Network Technologies Program Lecturer Duran KÜÇÜKLER, and Electrical-Electronics Engineering student Burak BEKYÜREK paid a visit to TEKNOFEST Secretary General Muhammet SAYMAZ to discuss potential collaboration. During the meeting, discussions were held regarding joint projects, student competitions, and academic contribution processes that can be realized within the scope of the University–TEKNOFEST partnership.
